title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Lenskart Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Lenskart Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Lenskart Digital Technologies:
Lenskart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart Digital Technologies!
